---
name: Question
about: Ask a question about the project, usage, or contribution process
title: "[QUESTION] <short description>"
labels: question
---

### Description
Provide a clear and concise question you have about the project.

### Context
- What part of the project does this relate to? (e.g., documentation, usage, contribution guidelines)
- Any relevant background information that helps us understand your question.

### Attempts Made
Describe any research or attempts you have already made to find an answer (e.g., reading docs, searching issues, trying code examples).

### Expected Answer
What kind of response are you looking for? (e.g., clarification, example code, reference to a section).

### Additional Information
Add any links, screenshots, code snippets, or other details that could help us answer your question.
